Live arrival guarantee: Most breeders include a live arrival guarantee (LAG) with overnight or 2-day shipping. Check individual seller shipping policies before ordering. Live insects are temperature-sensitive — avoid ordering during extreme heat or cold.

Buying tips

Start with easier species first (Ghost, Orchid, then Violin mantis) to build experience with flying prey and high temperatures. Buy young nymphs (L1-L3) rather than adults for better acclimation. Ensure you have a reliable supply of fruit flies and blue bottle flies before purchasing.
